results.name: alternate-cost-gain-life
results.description: Cards that let you give your opponents life to play them for less or no mana

results.name: alternate-cost-life
results.description: Cards that let you pay life to play them for less or no mana

results.name: alternate-cost-sacrifice
results.description: Cards that let you sacrifice permanents to play them for free/a reduced amount of mana

results.name: alternate loss condition
results.description: New ways for you to lose the game

results.name: alternate win condition
results.description: New ways for you to win the game (or cause your opponent to lose)

results.name: alternative crewing
results.description: Vehicles with crew that also have alternative ways for self-animation. For vehicles without crew see [crewless vehicle](crewless-vehicle).

results.name: amaurot
results.description: A city from the Unsundered Source. Emet-Selch created a replica of it

results.name: ambush
results.description: An ambush happening or imminent.

results.name: american gothic
results.description: A famous painting by Grant Wood depicting two farmers standing in front of a house.

results.name: amonkhet aven
results.description: Amonkhet has two distinct types of Aven, the Hawk headed, and the Ibis headed. Both with human torso and limbs.

results.name: amount spent matters
results.description: The amount of mana you spent to do the thing matters.

results.name: anaglyph glasses
results.description: The red/blue or red/green glasses used for stereoscopic images.

results.name: anagram
results.description: Cards whose names are intentional anagrams.

results.name: ancestral armor
results.description: The dragon-faced armor worn by some Abzan clan members.

results.name: ancestral recall person
results.description: That one guy who appeared in the art of the original Ancestral Recall. A very famous lad.

results.name: anchin
results.description: Yasova Dragonclaw's sabertooth.

results.name: ancient fang
results.description: An ancient, powerful dagger from Innistrad.

results.name: ancient (ffxiv)
results.description: The original species from the source before the sundering happened, with a few remaining unsundered ones becoming Ascians.

results.name: androzani minor
results.description: A desert planet that serves as the setting for the Doctor Who serial "The Caves of Androzani"

results.name: angel
results.description: Creature type generally with wings, and serving some form of god or other higher power, to do good.

results.name: angel island
results.description: Floating island, home of Knuckles the Echidna and the Master Emerald, setting of Sonic the Hedgehog 3 and Knuckles.

results.name: angler
results.description: Creatures with a dangling limb they use to lure prey

results.name: animal person
results.description: Anthropomorphic animals and other animal-like humanoid species. See also [bug people](bug-people) for the insectoid equivalent.

results.name: animalshifted
results.description: Outsiders on Bloomburrow find themselves shifted into plane-compatible animal forms.

results.name: animate
results.description: Effects that turn things into creatures.

results.name: animate artifact
results.description: Cards that can turn other noncreature artifacts into creatures. See also [animate vehicle](/tags/card/animate-vehicle).

results.name: animate dead-like
results.description: Enchantments that put stuff on the battlefield and then become Auras enchanting those things.

results.name: animate enchantment
results.description: Cards that can turn other noncreature enchantments into creatures.

results.name: animate land
results.description: Cards that can turn other noncreature lands into creatures.

results.name: animate planeswalker
results.description: Effects that turn planeswalkers into creatures.

results.name: animate self
results.description: Noncreatures that can become creatures. For creatures that can stop being creatures, see [deanimate self](deanimate-self).

results.name: animate vehicle
results.description: Cards that can turn other vehicles into creatures (other than by crewing them), permanently or temporarily. See also [animate artifact](/tags/card/animate-artifact).
